raw_consumer_statement: XXXX, XXXX  Barclays XXXX contacted me regarding unauthorized purchases on my credit card. I received first a text about a {$550.00} charge and texted that I did not authorize this purchase. I then received a phone call regarding a {$220.00} and {$180.00} asking if these charges were valid. I stated they were not authorized by me and that I had my card in my possession. Barclay 's immediately canceled that card, issued another card but added the {$220.00} and {$180.00}. Numerous times I have phone their customer service and have been told that I was not responsible for those purchases. However these charges remain on my account and after many calls I was told that I needed to send a letter to fraud claims dept. On XX/XX/year> I sent a letter explaining everything. that happened since XXXX. XXXX. XX/XX/year> I received a call from customer account who said I would receive another call from Fraud Team soo. On XX/XX/year> a letter was posted to my account explaining that they believe these charges to " not fraudulent '' and that I am responsible. However there was no explanation as to how they arrived at their conclusion. XX/XX/year>. I sent another certified letter requesting their documentation as to how they arrived at their conclusion. I have spoken to so many people from Barclays and get a complete run around regarding this issue. I have documentation of this unbelievable experience and proof of where I was that day.
